summary: I’d never before heard of this museum , but now that I’ve seen Wichary’s photos, I want to go. Unsurprisingly , a lot of his shots are details of vintage keyboards. I keep pausing on this one , a “ RE-START ” key with the word broken across two lines. It’s clearly wrong but somehow feels right. I’m linking to his album at Flickr, but he posted a long thread…
title: Marcin Wichary Visits the Large Scale Systems Museum
